nasb.text: By the transgression of a land many are its princes, But by a man of understanding and knowledge, so it endures.

esv.text: When a land transgresses, it has many rulers, but with a man of understanding and knowledge, its stability will long continue.

cnv.text: 國家因有過犯，領袖就經常更換； 依賴聰明知識俱備的人，國家才可以長存。

ccb.text: 国中有罪，君王常换； 国有哲士，长治久安。

csbs.text: 国中因有过犯，就有许多首领争权； 但靠着有悟性、有知识的人，国就得以长存。
